title: Areté Web App — v2
description: 6 tasks to enhance the reimagined web app: people category tabs, person detail page, interactive goal priorities, API key settings UI, markdown editor, and general polish.

tasks.title: People Page — Category Tabs
tasks.description: Add filter tabs (All/Internal/Customer/User) with counts above the people table. URL-sync tab state. Filter applies before search+sort.

tasks.title: People Detail — Full Page (replace drawer)
tasks.description: New /people/:slug full page with two-column layout. Enhance backend to return rawContent + allMeetings. Meeting rows open a Sheet drawer with summary. Remove old PersonDrawer from PeopleIndex.

tasks.title: Goals — Interactive Priorities
tasks.description: Make weekly priority checkboxes interactive. PATCH /api/goals/week/priority backend route. Optimistic update with rollback on error.

tasks.title: API Key Management UI
tasks.description: Settings page at /settings with API key section (show/save/remove). New backend routes GET/POST/DELETE /api/settings/apikey. Settings gear icon in sidebar links to /settings.

tasks.title: Markdown Editor (WYSIWYG-style)
tasks.description: Reusable MarkdownEditor component using TipTap. Wire into PersonDetailPage Notes section with edit/save/cancel. New PATCH /api/people/:slug/notes backend route.

tasks.title: General Polish & Bug Fixes
tasks.description: Empty state copy improvements, Settings sidebar link, meetings sidebar link verification, dashboard calendar empty state.
